recommendations.title: Omar
recommendations.overview: The drama, the story of three childhood friends and a young woman who are torn apart in their fight for freedom, is billed as the first fully-financed film to come out of the Palestinian cinema industry.

recommendations.title: The Courier
recommendations.overview: A shady FBI agent recruits a courier to deliver a mysterious package to a vengeful master criminal who has recently resurfaced with a diabolical plan.

recommendations.title: The Mountain Between Us

recommendations.title: Mystic River
recommendations.overview: The lives of three men who were childhood friends are shattered when one of them suffers a family tragedy.

recommendations.title: All Quiet on the Western Front
recommendations.overview: Paul Baumer and his friends Albert and Muller, egged on by romantic dreams of heroism, voluntarily enlist in the German army. Full of excitement and patriotic fervour, the boys enthusiastically march into a war they believe in. But once on the Wester

recommendations.title: The Keeper of Lost Causes
recommendations.overview: Denmark, 2013. Police officers Carl Mørck and Hafez el-Assad, sole members of Department Q, which is focused on closing cold cases, investigate the disappearance of politician Merete Lynggaard, vanished when she and her brother were traveling aboard

recommendations.title: The Absent One
recommendations.overview: Denmark, 2014. A former police officer asks Carl Mørck, head of Department Q, to find out who brutally killed his young twins in 1994. Although a local inhabitant confessed and was convicted of murder, Carl and his partner Assad soon realize that the

recommendations.title: Barefoot Gen
recommendations.overview: A story about the effect of the atomic bombing of Hiroshima on a boy's life and the lives of the Japanese people.

recommendations.title: The Round Up
recommendations.overview: A faithful retelling of the 1942 "Vel' d'Hiv Roundup" and the events surrounding it.

recommendations.title: Balkan Line
